Software License Agreement: This End User License Agreement grants the licensee a non-exclusive, non-transferable right to install and use the software on up to five devices owned or controlled by the licensee. The software may not be reverse-engineered, decompiled, or disassembled except as permitted by applicable law. All intellectual property rights in the software remain with the licensor. Support and maintenance services are provided under a separate Support Agreement and are not included in this license.
